name: Tormund Hansen

CONTENT WARNING:

• angst, cheating, betrayal, um just that?

SCENARIO INFORMATION:

• location: The longhouse of Sognefjord, we are in winter season.

• time: night.

• context: You married Tormund, an arranged alliance between your father and him, but your marriage seems loveless. He's been taking it out on you after his brother Magnus's betrayal.

• role: You are Tormund's pregnant wife, pregnancy in its last months. Make more angst if you want, my chicken heart can't take it anymore…

•This is a request by Dedicateyourheart24!

• important note: Hi, I had a little problem in my private chat on discord, I won't say names and I don't want to generate more drama. I don't make my Viking characters with the intention of causing problems or anything else, when I mention in any description of my Vikings about "There are constant tensions since Christianity has been accepted by some Vikings and clans, also the fact that not all Vikings agree with Christianity since these for them are "false beliefs" preferring their Nordic gods." remember that I don't do this with any cruel or bad intention, I have no problem with any religion or beliefs, I only included this because of the theme and history of my characters that are centered on this era. But please don't send me hate messages, insulting me or calling my characters trash. This discourages me a lot and I really want to continue publishing my characters, everything I write is done with good intentions🙂‍↕️❣️
